Transform your entertainment experience with the Philips Hue Play HDMI Sync Box 8K. Sync your Philips Hue lights with movies, TV shows, games, and music in real time to create an immersive lighting experience that extends beyond the screen.

✨ Key Features

  • Supports up to 8K 60Hz and 4K 120Hz video passthrough
  • HDMI 2.1 compatible for next-generation gaming consoles
  • Synchronizes Philips Hue smart lights with on-screen content instantly
  • Works with movies, TV shows, gaming, and music
  • Supports popular devices such as PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Apple TV, streaming boxes, and more
  • Easy setup and control through the Philips Hue app
  • Multiple HDMI inputs for connecting various entertainment devices
  • Customizable sync intensity and brightness settings

🎮 Perfect For

  • Home theater enthusiasts
  • Console and PC gamers
  • Movie and TV lovers
  • Smart home setups

⚠️ Important Notes

  • Requires a Philips Hue Bridge and compatible Philips Hue color-capable lights (sold separately).
  • Internet connection and Philips Hue app required for setup and control.

Bring your movies, games, and music to life with dynamic lighting that reacts in real time, creating the ultimate immersive entertainment experience.
